## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore/maintenance

## Related Issue

Link the issue(s):

- Closes #

## What Was Changed

List the key changes in this PR.

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

Add before/after screenshots or short recordings.

## Database Changes

- [ ] No schema changes
- [ ] Schema changed in `schema/schema.prisma`
- [ ] Migration added in `schema/migrations`
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run db:migrate`
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run db:generate`

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run build`
- [ ] Manually tested affected flows

## Security and Privacy Checks

- [ ] Verified auth/role checks for affected routes
- [ ] Verified input validation for new/updated API inputs
- [ ] Confirmed no sensitive files or secrets are exposed

## Deployment Notes

Describe anything reviewers/deployers should know (env vars, migrations, rollout notes, etc.).
